body:
A natural starting point. The design of some products is determined by the inherent beauty of the materials used to take them from conception to destination. Like the Ozzy and Kim chairs, that share a seeming simplicity of design that then reveals, in the exquisite craftsmanship of prized materials like wood and cowhide, the virtuosity of the Flexform artisans as they shape the vision into form. Or the Ginger sofa by Antonio Citterio that returns to the collection after more than 40 years, in a demonstration of design intuition that endures beyond the bounds of time and trends.

body:
Located on the island of Mallorca, this villa designed by ECA architects is meant to appear like the renovation of an older home, while it is instead completely new, in order to allow it to blend effortlessly into the surrounding landscape. Local stone, reed canopies and earthen stoneware bring an authentic sense of the local architectural traditions into the home. Seamless connections between the indoor and outdoor spaces lend an air of relaxed elegance that is also reflected in the furnishings chosen for the living area: the Romeo sofa paired with Happy armchairs, both designed by Antonio Citterio.
Courtesy of Estudio Cano Arquitectura / Photography by Tomeu Canyellas - Marc Anglada.
More www.flexform.it

body:
A natural starting point. The design of some products is determined by the inherent beauty of the materials used to take them from conception to destination. Like the Ozzy and Kim chairs, that share a seeming simplicity of design that then reveals, in the exquisite craftsmanship of prized materials like wood and cowhide, the virtuosity of the Flexform artisans as they shape the vision into form. Or the Ginger sofa by Antonio Citterio that returns to the collection after more than 40 years, in a demonstration of design intuition that endures beyond the bounds of time and trends.

📍INDOOR COLLECTION
Flagship Store | Via della Moscova 33

📍OUTDOOR COLLECTION
Chiostro Sant'Angelo | Piazza Sant'Angelo 2

At the Chiostro Sant’Angelo, the Flexform Outdoor Collection is revealed in a captivating installation that, in the poetic austerity of the architecture of the cloister, finds its ideal placement. The design of Milanese architect Giovanni Muzio eschews decoration as an end in itself, and instead focuses on the essential. So, too, does Flexform design find a natural rapport between design and built space, conveying an essential aesthetic value beyond the bounds of time and trends.

While it evokes the idea of an overarching display that embraces the diversity of shapes, solutions, and innovations that define Flexform’s design products, the title also carries an additional layer of meaning, encouraging visitors to explore the context in which the furnishings are placed. Each piece becomes part of a domestic landscape, blending seamlessly into spaces, emotions, and atmospheres.

Outdoor living, year-round, at any latitude.
Anchored by an open-air fireplace, the Camelot Outdoor sofa and Thomas Outdoor armchairs compose a lounge of quiet distinction, seamlessly immersed in nature. Generous proportions and tailored silhouettes define a setting conceived for conversation – where family and guests gather in understated comfort. Beneath the stars or washed in shifting daylight, the space remains composed, refined, and singularly welcoming. #Flexform #FlexformOutdoor #ThomasOutdoor #armchiar #outdoor #collection #design #AntonioCitterio #madeinitaly #designlover

Surrounded by Kim Outdoor dining chairs in natural iroko and hand-woven cord, alfresco dining becomes a sure pleasure rather than a seasonal indulgence. From long lunches to evenings that linger, the scent-filled garden sets the tone, and time is measured not in courses, but in company.
